name: Amigo Check Cashing
description_short: MoneyGram location at Amigo Check Cashing offering check cashing, money transfers, and cash services in Avondale, AZ with extended daily hours.
description_long:
Amigo Check Cashing - #0002 is a check-cashing and money services location in Avondale, Arizona that operates as a MoneyGram agent. The location provides consumers with access to essential cash-handling and money transfer services in a retail environment. The business is positioned as a convenient alternative to traditional banking for customers needing immediate check cashing and money movement solutions.

The facility offers check cashing services, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment options through the MoneyGram network. Customers can conduct both sending and receiving money transfers through this location. The company requires a valid legal form of identification for all cash-related transactions, which is standard industry practice. Services are available both online through MoneyGram's digital platform and in-person at the physical location.

This location distinguishes itself through extended operating hours, remaining open from 7:00 AM to 10:00 PM seven days a week, including weekends. This schedule provides accessibility for working individuals and those unable to visit traditional bank branches during standard business hours. The physical storefront location at 10730 W Lower Buckeye Rd in Avondale offers walk-in convenience with a direct phone line for customer inquiries.

As a MoneyGram agent location rather than an independent operator, this business relies on the established MoneyGram network infrastructure and brand recognition. Consumers should note that specific fee structures, limits, and service details are not disclosed on the provided website content. The location represents a straightforward cash services option for customers needing quick check cashing or money transfer capabilities without the need for a bank account.
address: 10730 W Lower Buckeye Rd, Avondale, AZ 85323

pros: Extended hours: Open 7 AM to 10 PM daily, including weekends and holidays
Seven-day operation: Available Saturday and Sunday when many banks are closed
Multiple services: Check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment all in one location
MoneyGram network access: Connected to established global money transfer infrastructure
No account required: Immediate cash services without bank account prerequisites
Physical location convenience: Walk-in access at 10730 W Lower Buckeye Rd in Avondale
Direct phone contact: Available at (623) 474-2217 for service inquiries
cons: Fee structure not disclosed: Website provides no information about check cashing fees or money transfer costs
Limited service transparency: No details on transaction limits, processing times, or specific service eligibility requirements
Single location focus: Profile shows only one Avondale location with no information about other nearby branches
best_for: Consumers needing after-hours check cashing on weekends or evenings
Individuals requiring quick money transfers without a bank account
Workers with non-traditional schedules unable to access bank branches during business hours
diagnosis: Best for individuals needing quick, after-hours check cashing or money transfers without a bank account. The primary caveat is that fee structures and transaction limits are not disclosed on their website, so customers should call (623) 474-2217 to confirm costs before using services.
